raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need command to print available space on filesystem containing /system directory in MB. Use df -k or -m. df -m /system | tail -1 | awk '{print $4}'. But to print amount of space available. df -m shows available in MB. So: df -m --output=avail /system | tail -n +2. Or simpler: df -m /system | awk 'NR==2{print $4}'. Provide command.

But to print amount of space available. df -m shows available in MB. So: df -m --output=avail /system | tail -n +2. Or simpler: df -m /system | awk 'NR==2{print $4}'. Provide command.
